creator: junchoon@dec.sakura.ne.jp
text:
(In reply to Igor Ostapenko from comment #8)
Another thing to consider is why version check excluding 13.x is implemented in devel/kyua at the first place.

If anything actually required is not yet MFC'ed with some reason (POLA violation?), the version check would be needed (not actually tracked commit logs, so not sure).

In this case, the conditionals are needed in current (in patch) form and removed once stable/13 is EoL'ed (at Apr.30, 2026).
